# Test files excluded from auto-triggered CI tests.
#
# Most connector tests run safely in CI via the in-process source
# simulator (no credentials, no network) — those should NOT be listed
# here. Only entries below are tests that genuinely cannot run without
# real credentials, or have known unrelated failures pending fixes.
#
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored.

# Covered by the dedicated `test-example` job in tests.yml — listing here
# avoids the `test-source` matrix from running it a second time.
tests/unit/sources/example/test_example_lakeflow_connect.py

# Custom group-based runner that reads dev_config.json (real creds);
# not yet wired up to the simulator.
tests/unit/sources/sap_successfactors/test_group_runner.py

# Standalone FHIR utility tests have 2 pre-existing failures that are
# unrelated to the simulator. Re-enable once those are fixed.
tests/unit/sources/fhir/test_fhir_utils.py
